task_name: Add JWT Authentication System to REST API

plan_metrics.plan_content:
The plan is ready for your review. Here's what will be implemented across **6 files** (2 new, 4 modified):

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `src/types.ts` | Add `Express.Request` augmentation for `req.user?: { userId: number }` |
| `src/middleware/auth.ts` | **New** — `authenticate` middleware: parse `Bearer` token, `jwt.verify`, set `req.user` or 401 |
| `src/routes/auth.ts` | **New** — `POST /auth/register` (SHA-256 hash, duplicate check, return token+user) and `POST /auth/login` |
| `src/routes/posts.ts` | Add `authenticate` to POST/PUT/DELETE; use token `userId` on create; ownership 403 on PUT/DELETE |
| `src/routes/comments.ts` | Same pattern as posts |
| `src/app.ts` | Import and mount `authRouter` at `/auth` |

**No new npm packages** — `jsonwebtoken` is already installed. Password hashing uses Node's built-in `crypto` module. All 19 tests in `auth.test.ts` are covered, and existing GET-only tests remain unaffected.
